_comment: Seed file used when the live Foundry Memory Store can't be reached (e.g., the project is not configured for the memory-store preview). Loaded by src/field-ops-agent/procedural_memory.py when PROCEDURAL_MEMORY_MODE is 'seed' or 'hybrid' and the live path fails. These two items illustrate procedural memory: patterns the agent has learned from past technician conversations.

content.applicable_to: When a user asks for a site's "last service date" and the service-history system includes both internal and third-party/vendor visits.
content.instruction: Ask a quick clarifying question (internal company vs third-party vs any) before querying/answering; if time-critical, present both the most recent internal and most recent third-party entries, clearly labeled.

content.applicable_to: When a user corrects a generic SOP with site-specific overrides during a time-critical procedure request.
content.instruction: Immediately restate the full procedure with the user-provided overrides integrated, and confirm the three key deviations up front (notification channel, test direction, and logging system) before listing the remaining generic steps.
